Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xE000 "SOOPERFROOT-E000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Sooper Froot.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
To reduce the time the copyright message is displayed on start-up by around 75%, the following patches were applied:
1. The first call to the delay subroutine ($EB12) at $E170 has been patched to be NOP, LDX #$05, thus removing the first delay. 2. The second call to the delay subroutine ($EB12) at $E173 has been patched to be JSR $EB16. This allows the use of the value in X set in step 1, instead of the default of $09. Although the first instruction in $EB12 is LDA #$00, this is safe here because the accumulator is already set to zero upon executing the code at $E170. It was important not to change the code in the delay subroutine itself ($EB12), because it is used elsewhere in the code.
